calendar.matters:
Notice And Moiton For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, Plaintiff Florentino Molino's motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole is taken off calendar. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice And Moiton For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Sep-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jose Antonio Zuniga, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, Plaintiff's motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver is continued to September 28, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 610. Counsel for plaintiff shall appear for hearing. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
